nodes.label: Filament Panel Access Control via active flag
nodes.rationale: Access to the Filament admin panel is gated by the `active` boolean field on User, rather than by role check alone, to allow quick account suspension without revoking roles.
nodes.norm_label: filament panel access control via active flag

nodes.label: Role Sync on User Create/Edit Pattern
nodes.rationale: Role assignment is extracted from form data before save and applied via syncRoles() in afterCreate/afterSave hooks because Filament form saves the model directly and the role_id is not a real column — it must be handled as a relationship side-effect.
nodes.norm_label: role sync on user create/edit pattern

nodes.label: SQLite Database Driver (default)
nodes.rationale: SQLite is configured as the default DB driver, making local dev and testing simpler without needing a separate database server.

nodes.label: Database-backed Cache and Session
nodes.rationale: Both cache and session are configured to use the database driver by default, which works out-of-the-box with SQLite without Redis.

nodes.label: Spatie Permission 24h Cache Strategy
nodes.rationale: Permissions are cached for 24 hours to optimize performance; the cache is flushed automatically when roles or permissions change.
